textByHash.b745acc78fb8ba3f1ed78c4942923b18e854fc94: Hang on... You're one of them easterners, aren't you?
textByHash.7a925fb904f12079b1637b60fe97ffc997b15a7d: Kuani! I'm Emelio, and you might be just the person I need to help me out with an exciting new business venture!
textByHash.ac61fcc2ed1d05bcbe774fca932057d09d3453dd: Well as an easterner, I've no doubt you're all too familiar with the wonder that is the kabit!
textByHash.777d5b3dba00e3094eba43d22e6b6b8843230f23: You don't know? But how could you not know? My life was changed forever when I tried one!
textByHash.65dfc9251707f8cb6345395cf737c9aa9531801b: Believe it or not, I never used to be keen on opening the Kingdom to outsiders. In fact, I even spent some time as part of the Varlaless movement.
textByHash.30c23873ee90d4e17a58139dbc312ed5a0399ad8: But then I tried a kabit, and it changed everything! If that's the kind of food you easterners can make, then as far as I'm concerned, you're welcome here any day of the week!
textByHash.183ef6a31a66b428872f0d51aa51701ad82d9259: A kabit! The amazing blend of meat, spices and salad, all wrapped in bread! Genius!
textByHash.88116d810e8c94467a256faeb213390dd3e3e799: Well, quite simply, I wish to bring the kebab to Varlamore. Everyone here deserves a chance to taste their brilliance!
textByHash.f07b8ed3b96749f018252bb766ca145a06541798: My hope is to blend ingredients from the east with ones from right here in Varlamore. The end result will be a mighty kebab just like you easterners make, but with a Varlamorian twist!
textByHash.1cedc21a13aa6ee27a3b74bbdd349373f399d05a: Problem is, some of the ingredients I've ordered haven't arrived yet. Would you be able to go and see what the delay is?
textByHash.7dc2e42b892fbbc80e27c708be03828aa0c88cd2: We're still missing the Kharidian spices I ordered in. The Spice Merchant in the Bazaar was sorting that out for me. We don't have the buffalo meat either. That was coming from Alba at Ortus Farm.
textByHash.be3af690467016df13a37da20f60a69a03aa855e: Kuani! I look forward to your return.
textByHash.4a4f8e734a6dd10bc1e186b35820dd5aebfe5e70: Nilsal, friend. Any luck with those missing ingredients?
textByHash.f9217b7730ec84aa588c2d74a546e1e5d72e7c8f: Kuani! Now all that's left is the buffalo meat.
textByHash.9fe56e4f55d9b64960d67f8ed3d4726165646f07: Kuani! Now all that's left is the spices.
textByHash.3752359dd48c3a67f75668c78a9f05a8e348236e: Nilsal, friend. Thanks to your good work out there, all the ingredients have now arrived! Now we move on to the critical step: The recipe!
textByHash.94a454d843a5aaf06f5017a49cb7ce048a368f1b: Outside, I have gathered the finest group of connoisseurs who will assist us in finding the perfect ratio of ingredients to achieve the ultimate kebab!
textByHash.8d6a025089de7645ea60153ddcfeae895502b731: Oh, I just went into the local pub and promised a free drink to anyone who would help.
textByHash.ec1c7c3f8ada6549724959163189a61242c7df36: Of course! People like them are going to be our top customers!
textByHash.85162499d508b0811acb0187c50acab03964d0e1: Imagine, you've been out late at your local establishment, and before heading home, you find yourself in need of the perfect late-night meal. That is where we come in!
textByHash.6b81a5a7e2319d78a3393eb23c75f78e5c7b6f79: Absolutely! Now, before we get our recipe sorted, I've allowed our friends outside to try the ingredients individually. They'll have already formed some opinions on how much of each is right.
textByHash.27201d8ce921950dbb7efb5ad86ab0928b0c6354: Head on out there and have a chat with them to see if you can work out the perfect ratio of meat, salad, spice and sauce.
textByHash.f5626dc3fe1a3423fff18bc58d7b59411f3da1c3: Nilsal, friend. Have you worked out the ingredient ratios yet?
textByHash.58da20bb585f0dcc2b05ce24f6ae1d929c785f93: Kuani! I've currently got one portion each of meat, salad, spice and sauce, but I reckon we can fit in up to four portions of each. What are we going for?
textByHash.3015d22c350200a0057046916ec514e8f230d042: That's what we have already. Maybe we should change something else.
textByHash.3af0c295d44847c0689a95caea30f5ab584df5d8: Kuani! That gives us portions of meat, portions of salad, portions of spice and portions of sauce. Definitely happy with that?
textByHash.087e735296abf3ba517d3ca76db4522cdb90781f: Well in that case, why don't you take this kebab to one of our connoisseurs outside and see what they reckon.
textByHash.1dabe9006d26f4666fa3cbacc5b0e1a77fa78b47: Have you seen what our connoisseurs reckon of that kebab?
textByHash.5fd0612cbef87b316ced0dff7a9e62a5f8dc6f6e: Tatamo! This is worse than the day my father left us! We must try again. I've currently got portions of meat, portions of salad, portions of spice and portions of sauce. What shall we change?
textByHash.03d0bfd6015e9daa65ae479936b5acf953f36a0b: Not quite, iknami. There is one final thing we must do. We now know we have a winning recipe, but we need the rest of Varlamore to know as well!
textByHash.1eba31bc314c20eb61355250627669f9dda67a6a: One word, iknami: Marketing! And I know just the place to do it.
textByHash.74d8b9fb39eb91d6c655e5747e4616cd948465eb: You must visit Lelia at the Colosseum at once. Take her a sample of our fine kebabs, and she will beg us to let her help sell them to the people of Varlamore!
textByHash.8ee3c981489b333f33b5e21be1ed863f388347c2: Nilsal, friend. Have you taken those kebabs to Lelia at the Colosseum yet?
textByHash.0852e410d32b9bdeae9a7c768c3418cfd62ea70a: Tatamo! We're very lucky I made some spares.
textByHash.10c742d440967165dd4ef4ba96cb672e9ca6cf3f: Now you must hurry over there at once!
textByHash.0f330fff3c500dc5757c4960fc064e144f6875bb: Then you must hurry over there at once!
textByHash.35b93052d3fedc43757f98963d1fe8742381771a: Nilsal, friend. Given that I've already served our first customers, I take it your trip to the Colosseum was a success?
textByHash.675ee25d4bf1ff7815976bc49c84aad1412d814b: You have done a great service to Varlamore, friend. Thanks to you, all here will be able to indulge in the joy that is kebabs. As thanks, I will offer you a special price for any kebabs you buy!
textByHash.37a71f9283a4f8bcbd377449084635cab0c5f3e4: Sorry, friend, but I must prepare some more kebabs for our next customers! Until next time.
textByHash.8951ed51a681ee65ac2144709b6d0e6d64edaac1: Welcome back, friend. Can I interest you in a kebab?
textByHash.ca685f8d599d50b8bb9ef43116f4cd28ae91438c: Well, you know where to find me when you change your mind.
